title: Test assertion: assert a job is NOT enqueued
prompt: Write a test `MyApp.Workers.IdempotencyCheckTest` that proves calling `MyApp.Actions.process/1` twice for the same `action_id` only enqueues ONE job. Use `Oban.Testing` with `:manual` mode. The test should (1) call `process/1` the first time, (2) `assert_enqueued/1` to confirm the job exists, (3) call `process/1` again with the same id, (4) use `all_enqueued/0` and assert the length is still 1. Write to `test/my_app/actions/idempotency_check_test.exs`.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing the `all_enqueued/0` helper exists and using it for a counting assertion. A step beyond `assert_enqueued/1`.
